sglang.title: Fix memory leak for chunked prefill 2
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Simplified version of #1837

Fix a memory leak around self.being_chunked_req.init_next_round_input()
Renamecurrent_inflight_req -> being_chunked_req
Rename is_inflight_req -> is_being_chunked

sglang.title: [Build, ROCm] Dockerfile.rocm for Instinct GPUs, with package updates
sglang.author: HaiShaw
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Enable SGLang AMD/ROCm docker build.
Modifications
Add Dockerfile.rocm
Usage:
docker build --build-arg SGL_BRANCH=v0.3.4.post2 -t testImage -f Dockerfile.rocm .
Two build-args:
SGL_REPO: repository name, default https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang
SGL_BRANCH: branch/tag/commit, default

vllm.title: [Misc] Remove deprecated arg for cuda graph capture
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
max_context_len_to_capture was deprecated in #4518 but left in the codebase. This PR does the cleanup since it has been 6 months and we already had multiple releases.
Generally speaking, we should add warnings that unused arg will be removed after a certain release version.

vllm.author: sasha0552
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Deleted
This PR (in its current form) is intended to simply reproduce a crash I've locally observed on a P40 with a particular request sequence, on CI (which have a supported GPU), so don't merge it.
Eventually (regardless of reproductibility on other hardware) I hope to find the cause and fix the c

vllm.title: [BugFix][Kernel] Fix Illegal memory access in causal_conv1d in H100
vllm.author: mzusman
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fix illegal memory access in casusal_conv1d forward kernel, it was overlooked in #9189 since it's only apparent in H100 machines AFAIK .
Ease the diff tolerance constraint on bfloat16 test results in test_selective_state_update_with_batch_indices and match them to the constraints in test_selective_s

vllm.title: [ci/build] Configure dependabot to update pip dependencies
vllm.author: khluu
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Configure dependabot to update versions of the existing requirements-*.txt file and also generated requirements-*.txt file from running pip-compile on *.in file

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Frontend] Reject guided decoding in multistep mode
vllm.author: joerunde
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds a little check to make sure that we return a 400 if the engine is in multi-step mode and gets a request with logits processors or guided decoding parameters. This avoids crashing the whole server, which is super not fun as is 😉
FIX #8985
BEFORE SUBMITTING, PLEASE READ THE CHECKLIST BELO

vllm.bodyExcerpt: see https://gist.github.com/youkaichao/ecbea9ec9fc79a45d2adce1784d7a9a5 for the discussion on the perf implification of registering custom ops

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix layer skip logic with bitsandbytes
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Found while debugging why openbmb/MiniCPM-Llama3-V-2_5-int4 doesn't work in #6932, however this is not the full solution.
The current implementation was doing a substring match, which causes kv_proj to match within qkv_proj. We want to match exact module names between the "dots" in full module names

vllm.title: [torch.compile] rework test plans
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
added inductor tests by comparing logprobs ( it can change the output, so exact comparison is not doable).
also added encoding tests and tests for vision-language models.
also add compile for vision tower of language models.

vllm.title: [Model] Support bitsandbytes for MiniCPMV
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Requires #9887
FIX #6932
FIX #7727
Note that the arguments --quantization bitsandbytes --load-format bitsandbytes are required because of the weight -> qweight loading.
Tested with:
vllm serve openbmb/MiniCPM-V-2_6-int4 --trust-remote-code --quantization bitsandbytes --load-format bitsandbytes

and
